description_long: This is a red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, designed for use with carbon dioxide as indicated by the white text and warning signage on its front. The extinguisher features a black discharge hose attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side with a bracket, and a black nozzle at the end for directing the CO2. A prominent black handle and lever assembly is mounted at the top, with a metallic pin or fastener visible at the hinge. The body is marked with a yellow triangular warning label and a yellow banded area labeled 'WARNING' below the main text. The surface shows minor speckling and wear, suggesting it is intended for practical use in urban environments. No pressure gauge is visible, and the mounting bracket appears as a black strap encircling the body.
description: A red, cylindrical carbon dioxide fire extinguisher with a black hose, handle, and yellow warning labels. The surface is slightly worn, and a black strap secures the hose to the body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white 'Fire Extinguisher' and 'CARBON DIOXIDE' text, yellow warning triangle, and the 'WARNING' label, with the hose and handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red surface, the black strap encircling the body, and the back of the handle and hose attachment.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the length of the black hose, the black handle, and the absence of any labels or signage on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hose running vertically along the body, the black strap, and the back of the handle assembly.
attribute_label_or_signage: White text and yellow warning signage on the front, including a triangular warning symbol and a yellow band labeled 'WARNING'.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black strap encircles the body, securing the hose; no wall or floor bracket is visible.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured with a strap; a black nozzle is present at the end.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the hinge of the handle assembly.
